hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path'); EXT="${FILE##*.}"; case "$EXT" in md) pnpm exec prettier --write "$FILE" && pnpm exec textlint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; ts|tsx|js|mjs|cjs|astro) pnpm exec prettier --write "$FILE" && pnpm exec eslint --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *) pnpm exec prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac
